<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Cancel a deal"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/{id}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions a deal to CANCELLED status.

  as={"h2"}
